'''âdh-w-th''' ('''dhawatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jovialize|jovialize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jovialize|jovialize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-w-th
|-
! Lemma
| dhawatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhawathithi|dhawathithi]] || [[word:dhawathiji|dhawathiji]] || [[word:dhawathishi|dhawathishi]] || [[word:dhawathi|dhawathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhawathuthuth|dhawathuthuth]] || [[word:dhawathujuj|dhawathujuj]] || [[word:dhawathushush|dhawathushush]] || [[word:dhawath|dhawath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhawathuthu|dhawathuthu]] || [[word:dhawathuju|dhawathuju]] || [[word:dhawathushu|dhawathushu]] || [[word:dhawathu|dhawathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhawathufuth|dhawathufuth]] || [[word:dhawathufuj|dhawathufuj]] || [[word:dhawathufush|dhawathufush]] || [[word:dhawathuf|dhawathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhawathethe|dhawathethe]] || [[word:dhawatheje|dhawatheje]] || [[word:dhawatheshe|dhawatheshe]] || [[word:dhawathe|dhawathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhawathothoth|dhawathothoth]] || [[word:dhawathojoj|dhawathojoj]] || [[word:dhawathoshosh|dhawathoshosh]] || [[word:dhawath|dhawath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhawathotho|dhawathotho]] || [[word:dhawathojo|dhawathojo]] || [[word:dhawathosho|dhawathosho]] || [[word:dhawatho|dhawatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhawathofoth|dhawathofoth]] || [[word:dhawathofoj|dhawathofoj]] || [[word:dhawathofosh|dhawathofosh]] || [[word:dhawathof|dhawathof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻf|dhawathĂŻf]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻf|dhawathĂŻf]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻf|dhawathĂŻf]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻf|dhawathĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻfĂŻf|dhawathĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻfĂŻf|dhawathĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻfĂŻf|dhawathĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻfĂŻf|dhawathĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻf|dhawathĂŻf]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻf|dhawathĂŻf]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻf|dhawathĂŻf]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻf|dhawathĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻf|dhawathĂŻf]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻf|dhawathĂŻf]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻf|dhawathĂŻf]] || [[word:dhawathĂŻf|dhawathĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhawathĂŠthĂŠ|dhawathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhawathĂŠjĂŠ|dhawathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhawathĂŠshĂŠ|dhawathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhawathĂŠ|dhawathĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhawathathath|dhawathathath]] || [[word:dhawathajaj|dhawathajaj]] || [[word:dhawathashash|dhawathashash]] || [[word:dhawath|dhawath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhawathatha|dhawathatha]] || [[word:dhawathaja|dhawathaja]] || [[word:dhawathasha|dhawathasha]] || [[word:dhawatha|dhawatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhawathafath|dhawathafath]] || [[word:dhawathafaj|dhawathafaj]] || [[word:dhawathafash|dhawathafash]] || [[word:dhawathaf|dhawathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhawathasha|dhawathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhawathasha|godhawathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhawathasha|gokidhawathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhawathnĂŒsha|dhawathnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhawathnknĂŒsha|godhawathnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhawathnĂŒsha|gokidhawathnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhawathshĂ«sha|dhawathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhawathnkshĂ«sha|godhawathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhawathshĂ«sha|gokidhawathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhawathrosha|dhawathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhawathnkrosha|godhawathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhawathrosha|gokidhawathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhawathmusha|dhawathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhawathnkmusha|godhawathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhawathmusha|gokidhawathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhawathsherasha|dhawathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhawathnksherasha|godhawathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhawathsherasha|gokidhawathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhawathngasha|dhawathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhawathnkngasha|godhawathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhawathngasha|gokidhawathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhawathyasha|dhawathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhawathnkyasha|godhawathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhawathyasha|gokidhawathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhawathyamasha|dhawathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhawathnkyamasha|godhawathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhawathyamasha|gokidhawathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhawathnĂŒshĂ«sha|dhawathnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhawathnknĂŒshĂ«sha|godhawathnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhawathnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokidhawathnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhawathnĂŒrosha|dhawathnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhawathnknĂŒrosha|godhawathnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhawathnĂŒrosha|gokidhawathnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhawathnĂŒmusha|dhawathnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhawathnknĂŒmusha|godhawathnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhawathnĂŒmusha|gokidhawathnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhawathshĂ«nĂŒsha|dhawathshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhawathnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|godhawathnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhawathshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokidhawathshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhawathshĂ«rosha|dhawathshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhawathnkshĂ«rosha|godhawathnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhawathshĂ«rosha|gokidhawathshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhawathshĂ«musha|dhawathshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhawathnkshĂ«musha|godhawathnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhawathshĂ«musha|gokidhawathshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhawathronĂŒsha|dhawathronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhawathnkronĂŒsha|godhawathnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhawathronĂŒsha|gokidhawathronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhawathroshĂ«sha|dhawathroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhawathnkroshĂ«sha|godhawathnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhawathroshĂ«sha|gokidhawathroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhawathromusha|dhawathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhawathnkromusha|godhawathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhawathromusha|gokidhawathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhawathmunĂŒsha|dhawathmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhawathnkmunĂŒsha|godhawathnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhawathmunĂŒsha|gokidhawathmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhawathmushĂ«sha|dhawathmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhawathnkmushĂ«sha|godhawathnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhawathmushĂ«sha|gokidhawathmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhawathmurosha|dhawathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhawathnkmurosha|godhawathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhawathmurosha|gokidhawathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhawath|dhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dhĂŠwĂŠth|dhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhawath|hodhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodhĂŠwĂŠth|hodhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhawath|hohodhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhĂŠwĂŠth|hohodhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒdhawath|nĂŒdhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒdhĂŠwĂŠth|nĂŒdhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdhawath|nĂŒnĂŒdhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdhĂŠwĂŠth|nĂŒnĂŒdhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻdhawath|nĂŻdhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻdhĂŠwĂŠth|nĂŻdhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdhawath|nĂŻnĂŻdhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdhĂŠwĂŠth|nĂŻnĂŻdhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhawath|ludhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludhĂŠwĂŠth|ludhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhawath|luludhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhĂŠwĂŠth|luludhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhawath|lidhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidhĂŠwĂŠth|lidhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhawath|lilidhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhĂŠwĂŠth|lilidhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhawath|kodhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodhĂŠwĂŠth|kodhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhawath|kokodhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhĂŠwĂŠth|kokodhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhawath|kedhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedhĂŠwĂŠth|kedhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhawath|kekedhawath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhĂŠwĂŠth|kekedhĂŠwĂŠth]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
